title: Document 5-second error timeout rationale and fatal-error behavior
description: app.rs tick_error_timeout() silently clears any error after 5 seconds. Two things are undocumented: (1) why 5 seconds (UX rule of thumb? measured? arbitrary?), and (2) fatal errors like auth failure are also cleared after 5 seconds, which means a user who blinks could miss the explanation for why nothing is working. A contributor won't know if this was intentional or an oversight. Add a comment in tick_error_timeout() stating whether fatal vs transient errors are distinguished, and where the 5-second value came from — or add a TODO issue reference if this is a known limitation.
close_reason: Already documented: tick_error_timeout doc comment explains 5s timeout, non-fatal nature, and contrast with status changes
